name: smart
description: Fail-fast git workflow plugin with smart check, commit, version bump, push, PR, statusline, and session distillation skills.

interface.shortDescription: Automate git checks, commits, pushes, and PRs.
interface.longDescription: Smart adds fail-fast git workflow skills for local checks, semantic commit splitting, version bumps, pushes, pull requests, statusline setup, and session knowledge distillation.
defaultPrompt: Push my work and create a PR.
